steps.title: Rewrite with exponent x
steps.content:
Move the factor $\frac{1}{4}$ into the base so the exponent is $x$.
$$f(x)=(1.69)^{x/4}=((1.69)^{1/4})^x$$

steps.title: Compute the percent value
steps.content:
Evaluate the fourth root and solve for $p$.
$$(1.69)^{1/4}=1.1402$$
$$\frac{p}{100}=0.1402$$
$$p=14.02$$
The closest choice is $14$. The answer is A.
